---
ID: US-SLD-063
Title: Export Decks to reveal.js Presentation Format
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want to export my deck to reveal.js
So I can publish web-native presentations quickly

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Each slide exports to a reveal.js `<section>`.
- [ ] Deck order is preserved in exported structure.
- [ ] V1 reveal export mode supports absolute-positioned HTML fidelity.
- [ ] Exported deck runs in browser with correct slide transitions.
- [ ] Export contract remains JSON-driven from SlideDocument deck data.
